entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
entries.value: "I weydii su'aalo ka hor sharxidda aad u badan."

entries.source: "Athens, 399 BCE"
entries.value: "Athens, 399 BCE"

entries.source: "Chang'an, 742"
entries.value: "Chang'an, 742"

entries.source: "Check my answer before giving yours."
entries.value: "Hubi jawaab ka hor siinta taada.-kayga"

entries.source: "Delhi, 1857"
entries.value: "Delhi, 1857"

entries.source: "Florence, 1504"
entries.value: "Florence, 1504"

entries.source: "Give me a harder version after I try."
entries.value: "I sii ka adag version ka dib I isku day."

entries.source: "Keep it beginner friendly."
entries.value: "Ka dhig beginner friendly."

entries.source: "London, 1666"
entries.value: "London, 1666"

entries.source: "Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "Isticmaal tusaalooyin ka yimid kayga exam, mashruuc, ama maalinle life."

entries.source: AI prompts
entries.value: Prompts AI

entries.source: Ask for a tiny first task.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay aad u yar koowaad task.

entries.source: End with a recap you write yourself.
entries.value: End leh recap aad qor yourself.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Build a temporal passport, clear the travel advisory, and explore a historical world through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Qaabkan, hawshu waa fududahay: Dhis temporal passport, cad travel advisory, iyo sahmi taariikhi adduun iyada oo loo marayo scene, khariidad, timeline, dad, xeerarka, inventory, iyo caddeyn.

entries.source: For Time travel, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: loogu talagalay Safar Waqti, waxtar leh wareeg tababar waa:

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: Good Prompts usually ku dar saddex things: maaddo, kaaga hadda jira heer, iyo kind ee caawin aad rabto. aad do ma u baahan perfect wording. aad only u baahan enough macne loogu talagalay session si begin.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: haddii response feels too broad, narrow taas. weydii loogu talagalay hal tusaale, hal faham-qaldan, hal hubi su'aal, ama hal tallaabada xigta. haddii taas feels too easy, weydii loogu talagalay challenge. haddii taas feels too adag, weydii loogu talagalay bridge ka yimid waxa aad already know.

entries.source: Immersion
entries.value: Dhex-gelid

entries.source: Make the output more useful
entries.value: Samee output badan waxtar leh

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Time travel on inspir.
entries.value: Fikrado prompt iyo wareeg waxbarasho oo la celin karo si natiijooyin waxtar leh looga helo Safar Waqti gudaha inspir.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: akhris AI response waa ma isku mid as waxbarasho. ka dib koowaad jawaab, weydii qaab si samee aad do something leh fikrad.

entries.source: Related learning paths
entries.value: la xiriira jidadka waxbarashada

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Request jawaab-celin ku part taas felt aan la hubin.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
entries.value: Respond ka hor weydiinta loogu talagalay solution.

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: bilow leh hal cad request

entries.source: State the goal in one sentence.
entries.value: State yool gudaha hal sentence.

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: xirfado waxbarasho

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: taas kama dambays recap waa important. marka aad sharax fikrad back, aad reveal waxa waa solid iyo waxa waa still borrowed ka yimid AI.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The journey stays anchored in state and evidence: what is known, what is reconstructed, what is speculative, and what your identity can realistically access.
entries.value: ugu fiican waxbarasho sessions waa adjustable. journey stays anchored gudaha state iyo caddeyn: waxa waa la yaqaan, waxa waa reconstructed, waxa waa speculative, iyo waxa kaaga identity wuu karaa realistically access.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Time travel is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Habka ugu dhakhsaha badan ee qiime looga helo Safar Waqti waa in AI-ga la siiyo hawl waxbarasho, ma aha oo kaliya mawduuc. Mawduucu wuxuu sheegaa waxa aad xiisaynayso. Hawsha waxbarashadu waxay sheegtaa nooca caawinta aad u baahan tahay.

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: kadib add constraint taas makes session badan shakhsi ah:

entries.source: Time travel prompts and study loop
entries.value: Safar Waqti Prompts iyo wareeg waxbarasho

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
entries.value: isku day hal ee kuwan starters:

entries.source: Turn the mode into practice
entries.value: qaab u beddel tababar

entries.source: Use Time travel when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Quiz me on Trivia. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Isticmaal Safar Waqti marka tani tahay qaabka saxda ah ee hawsha. Haddii aad rabto jid la xiriira, isku day Iga Imtixaan Aqoonta Guud. Waxa kale oo aad baadhi kartaa blogga waxbarashada AI si aad u hesho hababka waxbarashada, barasho Socratic ah, flashcards, jilid door, iyo xasuusin firfircoon.
